name: nomachine
description: Install NoMachine Enterprise Client and Desktop, and apply license if provided.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log} = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\nomachine-verify.log'; Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'NoMachine' -or $_.Name -match 'nx' } | Select-Object Name,Status | Out-File -FilePath ${log}; if (Test-Path 'C:\ProgramData\NoMachine\licenses') { (Get-ChildItem 'C:\ProgramData\NoMachine\licenses' -Filter '*.lic' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Append }; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\nomachine-smoke.txt') -Value 'nomachine_ok'"
